response.original_title: The Gates of Stars And Shadows
response.overview: The Gates of the Stars and Shadows  Mark Shan  A boy is pulled into multiple connected worlds, starting with Bennai (a twisted Chennai). As he travels through strange realities like Quliforinia, he uncovers a hidden force controlling the multiverse and must fight to return home before everything collapses.
response.tagline: Every gate opens a destiny… some lead to stars, others to shadows
response.title: The Gates of Stars And Shadows
